agent_log.output_summary: F5 frontend scaffolding: 10 skeleton files (5 pages + 3 component bodies-TODO + 2 hook decl-only), 4 filled-in files (ProtectedRoute, StatusBadge, ErrorAlert, types/api-error.ts), App.tsx routing shell + auth store rename to login/logout + lib/api.ts interceptor contract docs. tsc/vite build clean, lint 0 errors, 1/1 tests pass. Locked: error code map, status color map, polling rule (1500ms gated by status==='sending'), hook signatures + queryKeys, axios 401 handler.

F5 frontend implementation: filled in all 10 architect skeletons (5 pages + 3 component bodies + 2 hook files) + wired axios interceptors in lib/api.ts. All architect-locked decisions honored: messageFor for ALL error display, polling 1500ms gated by data.status==='sending', send mutation does NOT mark sent (optimistic flip to 'sending' only — polling carries it), schedule setQueryData merges into existing CampaignDetail to preserve stats/recipients, locked queryKeys + hook signatures unchanged. Added window.matchMedia polyfill in test-setup.ts so AntD responsive grid works under jsdom. tsc-b 0 errors, vite build clean (1.3 MB / 413 kB gzip), yarn lint 0 errors (1 pre-existing api warning), 1/1 tests pass.

F5 component tests: 4 new test files (1 component + 3 page tests) covering the architect-locked plan. StatusBadge.test.tsx asserts the locked color/label map across all 4 statuses via it.each (4 cases). LoginPage.happy.test.tsx mocks api.post + useNavigate, asserts auth store updated AND navigate('/campaigns', { replace: true }) called. LoginPage.401.test.tsx rejects with a real AxiosError carrying INVALID_CREDENTIALS, asserts the EXACT messageFor-translated string 'Invalid email or password.' (trailing period proves we went through messageFor, not error.message). CampaignDetailPage.send.test.tsx exercises the full draft -> click Send -> POST 202 -> optimistic 'sending' UI -> polling tick (1500ms real timer) -> 'sent' StatusBadge, asserting the .ant-tag-success class to disambiguate from the StatsBlock 'Sent' Statistic label. vi.mock for both api and react-router-dom (with vi.importActual). Final: 8/8 tests pass across 5 files, tsc + vite build clean, yarn lint 0 errors. No source bugs found.

F5 code review: APPROVED-WITH-NITS. Full read of all 18 frontend source files + 4 test files. Re-ran tests (8/8 pass), build (tsc + vite clean), lint (0 errors), and a vite-dev smoke (boots in 184ms, curl /=200). 0 BLOCKERs, 0 HIGHs. 1 MEDIUM (static notification.error API misses ConfigProvider theming) + 3 LOWs (destroyOnClose deprecation in AntD v5, 401 redirect-loop guard uses startsWith, per-page extractApiError duplication) logged in tech-debt.md. 5 PRAISEs noted: messageFor everywhere, send mutation does NOT mark sent (optimistic 'sending' + polling carries it), polling self-stops via function-form refetchInterval, token in-memory only (zustand, no localStorage/sessionStorage/cookie), zero dangerouslySetInnerHTML. DoD: 8/9 unambiguous green; README quick-start deferred to finalize. Workflow status flipped to 'verified'.
